research.title: Claude Code Token Optimization: How I Cut My Bill by 70% in One Week
research.whyTrending: Token costs are the #1 complaint in 2026 Claude Code discussions. Users report $20-40/day without optimization vs $5-15/day with good habits. opusplan, prompt caching, /compact vs /clear, CLAUDE.md bloat, .claudeignore - concrete strategies exist but scattered across 20+ blog posts
